name: Azure DevOps
description: Azure DevOps provides CI/CD pipelines, Git repositories, work item tracking, and project management for software development teams. Use this API to manage projects, create and query work items, trigger pipeline runs, manage repositories, and create pull requests across your Azure DevOps organization.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects in an Azure DevOps organization. Returns project names, IDs, descriptions, and state.

capabilities.name: create_work_item
capabilities.description: Create a new work item (bug, task, user story, epic, feature) in a project. Uses JSON Patch operations to set fields like title, description, assigned to, and priority.

capabilities.name: list_work_items_by_query
capabilities.description: Run a Work Item Query Language (WIQL) query to find work items matching specific criteria such as state, assigned user, type, or iteration path.

capabilities.name: list_repositories
capabilities.description: List all Git repositories within a project. Returns repo names, IDs, default branches, and URLs.

capabilities.name: list_pipelines
capabilities.description: List all pipelines defined in a project. Returns pipeline names, IDs, and folder paths.

capabilities.name: run_pipeline
capabilities.description: Trigger a pipeline run, optionally specifying a branch, variables, or template parameters. Returns the run ID and status.

capabilities.name: create_pull_request
capabilities.description: Create a pull request in a Git repository. Specify source and target branches, title, description, and optional reviewers.
